transcript: Speaker A: Take off. Take out. Put down. Pick up. Put in. Put on. Put away. असेच daily life मधील नवीन words शिकून English improve करण्यासाठी आजच MySivi app download करा. फक्त १ रुपयाच्या trial मध्ये आपली English speaking journey सुरू करा. [Take off. Take out. Start your English speaking journey with a trial of just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Take off, Take out, Put down, Pick up, Put in, Put on, Put away. असेच daily life मधील नवीन words शिकून English improve करण्यासाठी आजच MySivi app download करा [To improve your English by learning such new words from daily life, download the MySivi app today]. MySivi AI English Spe... Master Spoken Eng. Sharpen your Englis 1-on-1 calls. Try MyS fast. आजच MySivi app [MySivi app today]. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. फक्त 1 रुपयाच्या [For just 1 rupee]. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access. journey सुरू करा [start journey]
summary: The presenter demonstrates daily phrasal verbs using a bowl and a mango to teach English vocabulary. She then promotes the MySivi app to help users improve their English speaking skills. The ad concludes with a promotional offer of a 3-day premium trial for just ₹1.
